# Abstract {.unnumbered}

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\textbf{ABSTRACT OF THE DISSERTATION}

\vspace{0.5cm}

Regulation of MAPT (Tau) Translation in Basal Forebrain Axons

\vspace{0.5cm}

By ELINA NEMTSOV

\vspace{1cm}

Dissertation Director:\\
Dr. Wilma Friedman

\end{center}

\vspace{1cm}
```

Short summary — do last.
